# Geffrey H. Klein, MD, FACOG

> Board-certified OBGYN and obesity medicine specialist providing comprehensive women's health and weight management in Clear Lake and Webster, Texas.

Dr. Geffrey H. Klein is a board-certified Obstetrician-Gynecologist and Obesity Medicine physician practicing at Women's Specialists of Clear Lake in Webster, TX. The practice offers obstetrics, gynecology, robotic surgery, hormone therapy, and medical weight loss.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Practice overview, services, and contact info.
- [Weight Loss Clinic](/weight-loss): Medical weight management and obesity medicine services.
- [Patient Education](/patient-education): Health information and resources for patients.
- [Videos](/videos): Educational videos on women's health, surgical procedures, and weight loss.
- [Book Appointment](/appointment): Request an appointment or access new patient intake forms.
- [Consent Forms](/consent-forms): Online consent forms for procedures and treatments.
